title: selinum vaginatum var. vaginatum
intro: Selinum vaginatum var. vaginatum, also known as wild celery or small celery, is a perennial plant belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It is used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to ease digestive issues and soothe skin irritations. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues. Wild celery can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
